title: chionochloa conspicua subsp. cunninghamii
intro: Chionochloa conspicua subsp. cunninghamii, also known as tussock grass, is a species of grass native to New Zealand. This plant has been used in traditional Maori medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Chionochloa conspicua subsp. cunninghamii include reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, and it is also used in some modern herbal remedies for its medicinal properties.
